title: Block Sniffer
description: This mod adds several items which can help you find the block you're looking for.
body:
!["Block Sniffer" in 3D letters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36cb83c6ef7fbab56234e1f14e3d642a271322a4.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/S1ex3_8yhuE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This mod adds primarily two items to the game :
- The **Block Sniffer** which comes in three available tiers :
![Emerald tier tooltip : range of 7 blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2da7e8beb20551cdcb5fdda129a04434375f2d4e.png)
![Diamond tier tooltip : range of 12 blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0e62740308f2838beab4fc2f09ea196ea66a3d9.png)
![Echo tier tooltip : range of 17 blocks, compatible with items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cbbefb206a6775b4fad58dfd6a135fc78ba3111.png)

- The Echo Necklace :
The Echo Necklace doesn't have to be held to search blocks, but it has a smaller range compared to the Echo Block Sniffer :
![Echo Necklace tooltip : range of 12 blocks, don't need to be held, compatible with items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e284a8a01906fe63dc457b9821128528f80ed4e7.png)
<hr>
No sound will be emitted if the targeted block is near the player and visible.

When the targeted block/item will be held in the other hand, press the "Choose Target" keybind to search for it :
![Gif where you can see the player select a block as the target](https://i.ibb.co/PGtq5Wxp/s.gif)

The Block Sniffers and the Echo Necklace can use an alternative searching mode ("Similar Block") based on words. For instance, using it on a chest will make the searching items look for any type of chest, as long as the word "chest" itself is included in the block nametag. 

The mod is **compatible with modded blocks and items**.
<hr>

All Block Sniffer items need to be crafted using the Echo Pearl :
![Echo Pearl recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3afa1ac81fa24ed1379b581034f58361644e1a0d.png)

You can use that item to craft the Emerald Block Sniffer and the Diamond Block Sniffer :
![Emerald Block Sniffer recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac9602e6484e8717421664e90b0bf97130f03824.png)
![Diamond Block Sniffer recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65a5edbf657380c5954690a7f0fd7e28e1ffafb0.png)

However the Echo Necklace and the Echo Block Sniffer need the Calibrated Echo Pearl to be crafted :
![Calibrated Echo Pearl recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38b8b9defaacdb6cbddafbaa041eb3403e2a343d.png)
![Echo Block Sniffer recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/139af36e7a50ccc574d253f9f7bca10679ba8475.png)
![Echo Necklace recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eae132fb6f8af2500a113db6deb283945eeb056.png)
<hr>

Finally, also be aware that you can change the volume of the detecting sound by modifying the "Jukebox/Note Blocks" volume in the settings :

!["Jukebox/Note Blocks" volume setting in the game settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e02338aeb0da733a2838dcf0d146e8dde782016c.png)
